tasks_completed.notes: Session-based cart_items table with RLS. Uses x-session-id header for ownership.
Full CRUD for cart: GET (list), POST (add), PUT (update), DELETE (remove). Includes stock check on add.
checkout_sessions table stores shipping info and payment method. 24h expiry.
Checkout flow: init (get summary), shipping (save info), confirm (create order via Beta's API).

notes_for_next_agent.gamma: Cart/checkout APIs ready. Use localStorage 'cart_session' for session_id. POST /api/checkout with action: 'init' | 'shipping' | 'confirm'. Pay on delivery is default payment method.
